'''Dried Soy Beans''' is a soy-related crafting material.

{{Item
| name = 
| image = Soy beans dried.png
| id = soy_beans_dried
| type = Farming
| Subtype = Soy
| stackable = 64
}}
==Obtaining==
===Smelting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!(Smelting, Campfire, Smoker) Recipe
|-
|[[Soy Beans]]
|[[File:Soy beans dried smelting.png|336x336px]]
|}
*'''<code>Right click</code>''' [[Dried Soy Pods]] to obtain Dried Soy Beans.
==Used in==
*[[Soy Milk]]
==Trivia==
*It was added in DTN 1.18.0
*The '''soybean''', '''soy bean''', or '''soya bean''' ('''''Glycine max''''') is a species of legume native to East Asia, widely grown for its edible bean, which has numerous uses.
